agent.name: James Okonkwo
agent.notable_actions: Provided 3 actionable workarounds; correctly diagnosed high-bitrate video issue; added device to engineering ticket; opted customer into update notification

resolution.summary: Three workarounds provided (720p, cache clear, Chromecast). Device added to engineering ticket. Update notification opted in. Root cause (app crash on Samsung 2020 Crystal UHD for high-bitrate cycling/HIIT content) not yet fixed — engineering update targeted for mid-March. Customer decided to keep subscription.

key_moments.description: Customer opens with direct problem report — app crashes on Samsung TV for cycling classes
key_moments.trigger: Technical issue preventing use of paid content

key_moments.description: Customer accepts 720p workaround but expresses mild frustration: 'kind of annoying to pay for premium and watch in lower quality'
key_moments.trigger: Workaround degrades the premium experience they're paying for

key_moments.description: Customer considers pausing subscription due to renewal tomorrow
key_moments.trigger: Renewal timing makes the unresolved bug feel more urgent

key_moments.description: Customer decides to keep subscription: 'my wife uses it on her phone and she's happy with it'
key_moments.trigger: Household use case (wife on phone) justifies continued subscription despite personal TV issue

key_moments.description: Customer closes with thanks: 'nah that's it. thanks james'
key_moments.trigger: Issue handled efficiently in chat format; no friction

pain_points.description: Samsung 2020 Crystal UHD (55") crashes on cycling and HIIT classes — confirmed as high-bitrate video decode issue on older Samsung models. Yoga classes load fine. Engineering fix in progress.
pain_points.verbatim_quote: the app keeps crashing on my samsung tv whenever i try to open a cycling class

pain_points.description: Customer feels downgrading video quality to 720p is an unfair compromise for a premium-paid subscription.
pain_points.verbatim_quote: kind of annoying to pay for premium and watch in lower quality tho

motivations.description: Wife uses app on phone without issues — household value justifies subscription even while personal TV issue persists.

intent.primary: Resolve Samsung TV app crash on cycling and HIIT classes
intent.secondary: Considered pausing subscription due to renewal timing; ultimately kept subscription because wife uses app on phone

factors: Bug affects only TV; phone/tablet usage unaffected
Wife also uses app — household dependency reduces individual churn risk
Engineering fix targeted for mid-March; if delayed, churn risk could increase

topics.topic: Samsung TV app crash on high-bitrate classes

action_items.action: Add device (Samsung 2020 Crystal UHD 55") to engineering bug ticket for app crash on high-bitrate content
Opt customer in for update notification when Samsung TV app fix is released
Engineering to release Samsung TV fix by mid-March; if delayed, notify affected customers
